sources.title: Anti-aging Market Size to Hit USD 149.54 Billion by 2035
sources.claim: Global anti-aging market $83.21B in 2026, growing at 6.73% CAGR to $149.54B by 2035

sources.title: Longevity and Anti-Aging Drugs Market Size | Forecast 2035
sources.claim: Longevity drugs sub-market $19.18B (2025) → $21.47B (2026) at 11.9% CAGR, reaching $58.43B by 2035

sources.title: Sam Altman–backed AI biotech announces $1 billion to extend human life span
sources.claim: Sam Altman backed Retro Biosciences with $180M seed; company pursuing $1B Series A

sources.title: Aging startup Retro Bio chases $5 billion valuation
sources.claim: Retro Biosciences chasing $5B valuation for Series A as of December 2025

sources.title: FDA Greenlights Life Biosciences' First Human Epigenetic Reprogramming Trial
sources.claim: FDA cleared Life Biosciences IND application for first human epigenetic reprogramming trial (January 2026)

sources.title: FDA clears first human trial of epigenetic reprogramming therapy
sources.claim: Life Biosciences received FDA permission for gene therapy using partial Yamanaka factor epigenetic reprogramming

sources.title: AI at the service of longevity: OpenAI explores cellular reprogramming
sources.claim: OpenAI + Retro Biosciences AI models redesigned Yamanaka factors achieving 50x improvement in pluripotency markers (August 2025)

sources.title: Longevity Market Report 2026-2036: AI, Genomics and Regenerative Medicine
sources.claim: Longevity market report through 2036 citing AI, genomics, and regenerative medicine as key growth drivers

sources.title: Longevity Biotech Market Growth: How Fast Is Anti-Aging Science Advancing?
sources.claim: Anti-aging market generated $85B+ in 2025; AI-driven models predict biological age with 97% accuracy

sources.title: Longevity Market Funding Trends (2022–2026)
sources.claim: Cellular reprogramming and epigenetics captured $4.7B (62% of all longevity VC funding) 2022–2026; AI drug discovery raised $480M (6% of total)

sources.title: NewLimit raises $175M — Kleiner Perkins + Eli Lilly backing
sources.claim: NewLimit raised $175M backed by Kleiner Perkins and Eli Lilly for mRNA-based liver rejuvenation therapy

sources.title: Reversing Aging: How AI in 2026 is Rolling Back the Biological Clock
sources.claim: AI biological age clocks now predict mortality risk; epigenetic clocks accepted as FDA surrogate endpoints

sources.title: Epigenetic Clocks in 2026: Horvath, GrimAge, DunedinPACE Compared
sources.claim: DunedinPACE measures biological aging rate from 173 CpG methylation sites; responds to interventions within 4–8 weeks

sources.title: CES 2026 Trends: AI, Robotics and Longevity Tech
sources.claim: CES 2026 featured dedicated longevity tech pavilion; Withings Body Scan 2 tracks 60+ biomarkers

sources.title: The longevity revolution is here. Our systems still think we die at 65
sources.claim: Longevity economy broadly valued at $740B+ in 2026; systemic mismatch between longevity science and healthcare infrastructure

sources.title: AI and Longevity: Consumer and Expert Attitudes — MIT AgeLab
sources.claim: MIT AgeLab research on AI applications in longevity across health, finance, workplace, and social domains

notes: search_volume (~90,000/mo) is an estimate for the 'longevity' keyword category; exact figures for 'AI longevity tech' keyword require SEMrush/Ahrefs direct query [unverified]
growth_5y (+77%) calculated from anti-aging market ~$47B estimate in 2021 vs $83.21B in 2026 per Precedence Research — reflects broad anti-aging market, not AI-specific sub-segment
growth_1y (+12%) is the 11.9% CAGR for longevity drugs sub-market per Global Growth Insights
growth_3m (+50x) refers to the OpenAI + Retro Bio efficiency improvement in cellular reprogramming — a technical/biological milestone, not a market size metric
Altos Labs valuation ($5B+) sourced from Longevity Initiative reporting; precise current valuation not publicly disclosed
Retro Biosciences $1B Series A details are based on December 2025 reporting of fundraising intent; closing terms may differ
